title: 12th Angel
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] 12th Angel             Quote Post by Pnnn » Tue Feb 12, 2013 2:25 pm Hi. c: Since I hadn't seen any other topic about this, there's nothing wrong about starting this one, right? So... I think that the 12th Angel from Rebuild is, in fact, Armisael, the original anime's 16th angel. Why? -It was lying in a core before attacking (in the anime, Armisael didn't actually attacked Unit00, it attacked Unit01, and only after fusing with Unit00's core). -It has no actual shape, just like Armisael hadn't. -It's main target was Unit01 (in Rebuild, it was being used as Wunder's core, if I'm not wrong). -"It's whole body is a core". -It was killed by a selfdestructing attack. And I think this is it, if I remember anything else, I'll edit this post, okay? Also, sorry if my english typing seems a bit wrong, I'm not fluent. ;;

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Tue Feb 12, 2013 4:48 pm Do you mean that the 12th Angel in 3.0 fused with Mark.09? Common interpretation is that Mark.09 released the 12th Angel by cutting Mark.06's head, then the angel flew around and for some reason concentrated in a core-like object in eva-13's mouth along with Lilith's corpse goo, and when eva-13 bit, it got killed, hence the rainbow. Also eva-13 seems to absorb all this stuff. The Mark.09 seemed to be awakened with a dummy-like program made by Seele and was trying to fuse with the Wunder for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Pnnn » Tue Feb 12, 2013 5:54 pm ...Just what? The 12th angel was killed by Unit02's selfdestruction, didn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Tue Feb 12, 2013 6:51 pm No, the big boom killed the Mark.09, not the Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Tue Feb 12, 2013 7:09 pm Pnnn wrote: ...Just what? The 12th angel was killed by Unit02's selfdestruction, didn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by Pnnn » Tue Feb 12, 2013 7:23 pm I've never said this. What I said is that the 12th angel used Mark.06/Mark.09 as it used Unit00 on the original series. But I really haven't seen it being killed by Unit13, maybe I should watch the scene again. Edit: Watched the whole scene again, but I think that the core that Unit13's ate wasn't 12th angel's core. It actually fused with Mark.09, doesn't it? And it was killed right before trying to fuse/kill Unit02. I do think it's the angel since it completely changes Mark.09's shape. Edit2: As Bardiel, maybe the 12th angel was just "resting" on the insides of Mark.06, the core that Unit13 ate may just be Mark.06's core.

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Tue Feb 12, 2013 7:43 pm The Angel was never seen touching the Mark.09. As soon as the Mark.06 lost its head, the Angel got out and immediately zoomed to Unit-13. Plus, Unit-13 must have nommed the Angel's core to achieve its pseudo-evolved form; after all, Unit-01 nommed Zeruel to achieve the same.

[]:             Quote Post by Pnnn » Tue Feb 12, 2013 7:47 pm amitakartok wrote: The Angel was never seen touching the Mark.09. As soon as the Mark.06 lost its head, the Angel got out and immediately zoomed to Unit-13. Plus, Unit-13 must have nommed the Angel's core to achieve its pseudo-evolved form; after all, Unit-01 nommed Zeruel to achieve the same.

[]:             Quote Post by Jadley » Tue Feb 12, 2013 7:53 pm Pnnn wrote: I think that Zeruel's case was a bit different, since the Impact started before Unit01 "eatings" it's core. And the thing that left out Mark.06 wrapped Mark.09, doesn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Tue Feb 12, 2013 8:59 pm OP; 12th Angel ≠ the Mark.09. The 12th Angel was within the Mark.06 (Hidden? Trapped? We don't know the specifics), and once it gets out it fuses with the remains of Lilith, which Eva-13 proceeds to "nom" down on. Then we get our Radiant Giant/Whore of Babylon and 4I begins. The Mark.09's awakened form is not technically classed as an Angel. Well, not really anyway but it is one of the re-purposed Adams, along with the Mark.06 and Evangelion 13.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Feb 13, 2013 12:44 am Let's just get it all down to be clear: *The Twelfth Angel was trapped within the Mark.06 *The Twelfth Angel's entire body is a core; shooting it and attacking it conventionally will do nothing. *ReiQ releases the Twelfth Angel on Gendo's orders, by having Eva Mark.09 decapitate Eva Mark.06 with Mark.09's scythe. *The Twelfth flies around for a while, Asuka shoots it to no avail, then it fuses with the remains of Lilith and Eva Mark.06 to make a big embryo-like thing, which then shrinks until it becomes a core-like object, which Eva-13 then noms on.

[]:             Quote Post by Mbryo » Sat Feb 23, 2013 10:00 am Wait, regarding Armisael in NGE, did she have a whole body-core as well?

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sat Feb 23, 2013 10:24 am Mbryo wrote: Wait, regarding Armisael in NGE, did she have a whole body-core as well?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Feb 23, 2013 10:51 am Mbryo wrote: Wait, regarding Armisael in NGE, did she have a whole body-core as well?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 04, 2013 12:25 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: then it fuses with the remains of Lilith and Eva Mark.06 to make a big embryo-like thing

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Mon Mar 04, 2013 2:42 pm Blue Monday wrote: The 12th Angel was within the Mark.06 (Hidden? Trapped? We don't know the specifics), and once it gets out it fuses with the remains of Lilith , which Eva-13 proceeds to "nom" down on.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 04, 2013 2:45 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Correct me if I'm wrong, but didn't Lilith's remain explode/dissolve after Shinji grabbed the spears?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Fri Apr 05, 2013 11:31 pm I understood that the 12th angel was absorbed into Mark 6... Assuming it is like Armisael in the bio-fusing aspect and assuming the "Mark" units lack AT field projection capabilities then it's possible that the angel contaminated the Eva far more rapidly than with Eva 00 (wicth kept the Armisael at bay with it's AT field)... I suppose that they deemed the unit lost, used a Dummy System to have itself paralyzed with the Spears along with the angel and Lilith...

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Apr 06, 2013 12:35 am arael wrote: I suppose that they deemed the unit lost, used a Dummy System to have itself paralyzed with the Spears along with the angel and Lilith...

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Apr 06, 2013 12:38 am TheFriskyIan wrote: it still doesn't explain why Kaworu threw the Mark 06 away, he was riding in style with that thing.

I think that the 12th Angel from Rebuild is, in fact, Armisael, the original anime's 16th angel. Why? -It was lying in a core before attacking (in the anime, Armisael didn't actually attacked Unit00, it attacked Unit01, and only after fusing with Unit00's core). -It has no actual shape, just like Armisael hadn't. -It's main target was Unit01 (in Rebuild, it was being used as Wunder's core, if I'm not wrong). -"It's whole body is a core". -It was killed by a selfdestructing attack. And I think this is it, if I remember anything else, I'll edit this post, okay? Also, sorry if my english typing seems a bit wrong, I'm not fluent. ;;

Also eva-13 seems to absorb all this stuff. The Mark.09 seemed to be awakened with a dummy-like program made by Seele and was trying to fuse with the Wunder for some reason.
